flood.name: Flood
flood.description: Heavy monsoon flooding affecting low-lying areas and bridges
flood.aiTitle: Flood risk detected near River Bridge Corridor
aiEvidence: High blockage probability on low-lying road segments
Bridge corridor has high network centrality
Hospital access may be delayed for three wards

landslide.name: Landslide
landslide.description: Landslide risk on hill roads and mountain passes
landslide.aiTitle: Landslide risk on Hill View Connector and Mussoorie Diversion
aiEvidence: Hill roads show elevated blockage probability
Mussoorie Diversion Road has previous debris history
Evacuation shelter access may be compromised

cyclone.name: Cyclone
cyclone.description: Cyclone impact on tree-lined and major corridor roads
cyclone.aiTitle: Cyclone impact predicted on major corridors
aiEvidence: Tree-covered roads face high debris blockage risk
Major corridors may experience wind damage to signage and infrastructure
Multiple emergency routes may need rerouting

normal.name: Normal
normal.description: No active disaster scenario — routine monitoring
normal.aiTitle: No active threats detected — routine monitoring active
aiEvidence: All road segments are within normal operational parameters
